title: Inverted Ores
description: Inverts Ores (for example makes a coal ores visually look like diamonds and so on)
body:
Inverts your ores.

For example if you break a diamond ore youll get a coal ore instead and so on.


![Which ores are inverted by which](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d40d93ea1319977d67cccb36445340bce1c732c.png)

Simple silly resource pack that came in my mind when I was sleeping.
